call_transcript: Agent: Hi Eleanor, this is Mark calling from Finance Solutions. I see you recently inquired about a personal loan on our website. Um, how are you doing today? Customer: Yeah, hi. Fine, I guess. Agent: Great! So, we're pre-approving you for a $10,000 Personal Loan at a rate of 8.99%.  Is that something you'd be interested in discussing? Customer: Well, I'm looking at consolidating some debt.  What are the terms like? Agent: Absolutely. The loan term is flexible, from 2 to 5 years.  We can tailor it to your monthly budget.  What kind of monthly payment are you comfortable with? Customer: I don't know, maybe around $200? Agent: Okay, let me run some quick calculations... With a 5-year term, your monthly payment would be approximately $198.  Does that sound good? Customer: Hmm, that's… pretty good actually. What are the fees? Agent: There's a one-time origination fee of $150.  Otherwise, no hidden fees.  We believe in transparency. Customer: Okay. And there's no penalty for paying it off early? Agent: No penalty at all!  You can pay it off whenever you like.  So, are you ready to move forward with the application? Customer: Yeah, okay. Let's do it.

Agent: Hello Mr. Miller? This is Sarah calling from Finance Solutions. We have a great offer on our Signature Credit Card. Customer: Where did you get my number? I didn't give anyone permission to call me. Agent: Sir, we… uh… we acquired your information through a marketing partner. We are pre-approving you for a $5,000 Signature Credit Card at an interest rate of 19.99%. Customer: 19.99?! Are you kidding me? That's outrageous! Agent: Well, sir, it depends on your credit score… Customer: Look, I'm retired. I don't need another credit card. And I certainly don't want one with a nearly 20% interest rate.  Just take me off your list. Agent: Okay, sir. I understand. I'll make a note of that. Have a good day. *click*

Agent: Hi Jessica, this is David from Finance Solutions. I'm calling regarding a pre-approved Personal Loan.  How are you today? Customer: Good, thanks.  My friend mentioned you guys called her. Agent: Excellent! Yes, we're offering a $20,000 Personal Loan at 7.49%.  What are you hoping to use the funds for? Customer: I'm thinking about renovating my kitchen. It's… a bit of a disaster. Agent: Oh, renovations are great!  We can definitely help with that.  We have flexible repayment options.  Would you like me to go over the details? Customer: Sure.  What's the monthly payment look like? Agent: With a 5-year term, your monthly payment would be around $391.  We also offer terms up to 7 years, which would lower the monthly payment, but increase the total interest paid. Customer: Hmm, okay.  What about fees? Agent: There's a $200 origination fee.  But we're currently waiving that for preferred customers.  Since you were referred by a valued client, we can waive it for you. Customer: Oh, really? That's great! Agent: Absolutely! So, are you ready to proceed with the application? Customer: Yeah, let's do it.  Just send me the link.

Agent: Hello Mr. Brown? This is Lisa from Finance Solutions. We're offering a great deal on our Signature Credit Card. Customer: (Interrupting) Are you kidding me? You guys called me *yesterday*! I told you I'm not interested!  Where did you even get my number?! Agent: Sir, I apologize for the inconvenience. We are pre-approving you for a $7,500 Signature Credit Card at 17.99%... Customer: (Shouting) I said NO!  Do NOT call me again!  This is harassment! *click*

Agent: Hi Sarah, this is Mark from Finance Solutions. I see you filled out a form on our website regarding a personal loan. How are you doing today? Customer: Yeah, hi. I'm good. Agent: Wonderful! We're pre-approving you for an $8,000 Personal Loan at a rate of 9.49%. What are you planning to use the loan for? Customer: I'm thinking about taking a coding bootcamp. It's pretty expensive. Agent: That's a great investment in your future! We can definitely help with that.  What's your current employment situation? Customer: I work as a marketing assistant. Agent: Excellent.  And what's your monthly income? Customer: Around $5,000. Agent: Okay, perfect.  With your income and credit score, you're in a great position.  We can offer you a 3 or 5-year term.  A 5-year term would result in a monthly payment of approximately $178.  Does that sound manageable? Customer: That sounds pretty good. I need to think about it, though. Agent: Absolutely. I can email you a detailed breakdown of the loan terms and conditions. Would you like that? Customer: Yes, please. That would be great.

Agent: Hello Mr. Lee? This is Sarah calling from Finance Solutions. We have a special offer on our Signature Credit Card. Customer: (Slowly) Hello? What was that? Speak up, please. Agent: I said, I'm calling from Finance Solutions about our Signature Credit Card. We're pre-approving you for a $2,500 card at 22.99%. Customer: 22.99?! That's… that's a very high rate, isn't it? Agent: Well, sir, it depends on your credit history… Customer: I'm retired. I don't really need a credit card. And frankly, I don't appreciate you calling me out of the blue.  I didn't ask for this. Agent: I understand, sir. I apologize if I disturbed you.  Have a good day. *click*

Agent: Hi Ashley, this is David from Finance Solutions. Great to speak with you again! I see you're already a valued customer. We're offering a special rate on a Personal Loan. Customer: Oh, hi David. Yeah, I remember. Agent: Excellent! We're pre-approving you for a $15,000 Personal Loan at a rate of 6.99%. What are you considering using the funds for? Customer: I'm looking to invest in my small business. I need some capital for inventory. Agent: That's fantastic! Investing in your business is a smart move. We can definitely help with that. We have flexible repayment terms, from 2 to 7 years. What monthly payment are you comfortable with? Customer: I'd like to keep it under $300 if possible. Agent: Let me calculate that for you… With a 5-year term, your monthly payment would be approximately $290.  That includes principal and interest. Customer: Okay, that sounds good. What about fees? Agent: There's a $250 origination fee, and a small annual fee of $50. However, as a preferred customer, we can waive the origination fee for you. Customer: Really? That's great! Agent: Absolutely! We value your business.  We also offer a rate discount if you enroll in automatic payments. Customer: Hmm, okay.  I think I'm ready to move forward.  What do I need to do? Agent: Wonderful! I'll just need to verify some information and then we can start the application process.  It's quick and easy.  So, let's start with your current address…

Agent: Hello Mr. Thompson? This is Lisa from Finance Solutions. We're offering a great deal on our Signature Credit Card. Customer: (Interrupting) Where did you get my number? I never signed up for anything. Agent: Sir, we are pre-approving you for a $3,000 Signature Credit Card at an interest rate of 20.49%... Customer: (Scoffs) 20.49?! Forget it. Don't call me again. *click*

Agent: Hi Maria, this is Mark from Finance Solutions. I see you recently submitted an application for a personal loan on our website. How are you doing today? Customer: Hi Mark, I'm doing well, thank you. Agent: Excellent! We're pre-approving you for a $25,000 Personal Loan at a rate of 5.99%. What are you planning to use the funds for? Customer: I'm looking to purchase a new car. My current one is getting pretty old. Agent: That's a great reason to get a loan! We have very competitive rates and flexible terms. What kind of car are you looking at? Customer: I'm thinking about a Tesla Model 3. Agent: Oh, a Tesla! Very nice. We can definitely help you finance that. We offer terms from 2 to 7 years. A 5-year term would result in a monthly payment of approximately $478. Customer: That sounds reasonable. What about fees? Agent: There's a $300 origination fee, but we're currently offering a promotion where we'll waive that fee for online applicants. Customer: Oh, that's good to know. Are there any prepayment penalties? Agent: No, absolutely not. You can pay off the loan at any time without any penalties. We encourage you to do so! Customer: Okay, that's great. What documents do I need to provide? Agent: We'll need a copy of your driver's license, proof of income, and proof of insurance. We can send you a secure link to upload those documents. Customer: Sounds good. Let's proceed then. I'm ready to apply. Agent: Wonderful! I'm confident we can get this loan approved quickly for you. Let's start with your date of birth…

Agent: Hello Mr. Williams? This is Lisa from Finance Solutions. We're offering a special offer on our Signature Credit Card. Customer: (Confused) Hello? What did you say? I didn't quite catch that. Agent: I said, we're offering a Signature Credit Card. We're pre-approving you for a $1,000 card at 24.99%. Customer: 24.99? What does that even mean? Is that a lot? Agent: Sir, it's the interest rate… Customer: (Interrupting) Interest rate? Oh dear. I don't understand any of this. I just want to watch my stories. *click*
